headline: Is TransDigm’s Aftermarket Pricing Power Reshaping Its Core Investment Narrative (TDG)?
summary: In recent days, TransDigm Group has attracted attention for its strong organic revenue growth, expanding profitability, and solid free cash flow generation from its aircraft components business. Investors are focusing on TransDigm’s ownership of mission-critical, FAA-certified parts that support recurring aftermarket demand and give the company meaningful pricing power. Next, we will examine how this focus on mission-critical, high-margin aftermarket parts could influence TransDigm’s...
